string.text:
The HK-417 is a renowned and highly versatile battle rifle designed and manufactured by Heckler & Koch (HK). This semi-automatic rifle is chambered in various powerful calibers such as 7.62x51mm NATO, providing exceptional accuracy and stopping power at extended ranges. Its robust construction and modular design enable easy customization with a wide array of accessories, allowing users to adapt it to various tactical scenarios. Trusted by military and law enforcement units worldwide, the HK-417's exceptional reliability, ergonomic features, and advanced engineering make it a preferred choice for professionals and enthusiasts alike seeking a reliable and effective rifle for combat and precision shooting.
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: Most optics for the Picatinny/weaver system
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Suppressor: AAC 7.62 SDN-6
